target: 2. Shadow Mio's Aim

This video on my smartphone
was recorded last night…

At that time, I was taking a bath.
So this isn't me…
…No good.
Eh…?

No good, Shinpei-kun.
This kind of joke isn't allowed.

If you even bring a knife out, it's not funny!
You even dragged Mio-chan into it!
Ah, um…

That's pretty low.
You don't mess with adults like that.
(I guess they don't believe me…)
Shin-chan…
(But at least with her, I want to get the police's help…)

Is that all?
Well, I'm about to…

Ah, um!
About the report last night…

Ah, that prank.
No more of that from now on.

Around 9 PM last night…
Were you planning to pass by Kofune?
…Huh?

If that report hadn't happened yesterday,
I was supposed to pass by Kofune around 9 PM.
But…
Exactly…
Why does Shinpei-kun know this?

Last night…
If I hadn't made that call…
You might have been killed by this fake Mio!
Hahhhhh??

Wait, Shin-chan! 
Was the shadow targeting me?!

A shadow with my same appearance trying to kill me…
That's the 'Shadow Sickness,' right?!

Calm down, Mio.
It's just a possibility, but
it's not an impossible thing.

That shadow was clearly trying to kill you.
It even had a knife.

If that shadow had met Tetsu…
Do you think he'd have gotten away?

(From previous memories, it seems
that if nothing was done, Tetsu would have been killed
almost certainly)

(But I can't tell them now.
They'd think it's just a joke)
(Even if they die, they'll come back…)

(I should keep quiet about that phenomenon
for now)

Wait wait!
The 'Shadow Sickness'…
That thing, right?!

The one where seeing a shadow
means you die…

Yes.
It's not just a superstition.
It's real.
This video is proof!
This is proof…
(I guess they still don't believe me…)

Well, whether you believe it or not,
it's up to you right now.
Huh?
Tell me more.

Listening to the kids' stories
is part of being a hero, right?
Fuh… Anyway, I get what you're saying.

There's a fake Mio on this island…
That's the problem, right?

If that's true, anyone could be attacked
anytime, anywhere…
…Yeah, I get it!
Um, believe me…

I believe, I believe.
If I saw both of your serious faces,
I'd be the one doubting if I didn't.
Tetsu!

Leave it to me!
I'll solve it in a flash!

Honestly, a bit…
No, quite unreliable…

(But I'm glad they believe me.
Having the police on our side would be reassuring)

Right, you heard what I said earlier?
A detective from the mainland is coming
on the afternoon ferry.
Let's talk to them first.

Y-Yes, please!
Good for you, Shin-chan.
Yeah…

But that shadow of Mio's…
If it was targeting Mio,
why didn't it just break into her house?

Ah… Probably to avoid
drawing attention…
Wait a second!
Something wrong?

Maybe the shadow's real target
was actually me?
Huh…?

That's why it didn't go into Kofune.
It was waiting for me on the road--

Because I'm the town's hero
and a top-notch officer--

Yeah, that's definitely it!
There's no other explanation!
…Is that true?
Ah, heh heh…
(I guess that's not the case, but…)
